headline: Residential REITs See Easing Supply: Will AVB, EQR, ESS & UDR Gain in Q1?
summary: AVB, EQR, ESS and UDR are set to report Q1 2026 earnings in late April, as demand rebounds and apartment supply pressure starts easing.

raw.headline: Residential REITs See Easing Supply: Will AVB, EQR, ESS & UDR Gain in Q1?
raw.summary: AVB, EQR, ESS and UDR are set to report Q1 2026 earnings in late April, as demand rebounds and apartment supply pressure starts easing.

headline: Will EQR’s Shift to Asset Sales and Buybacks After a Tough 2025 Change Equity Residential’s Narrative?
summary: Equity Residential recently reported that 2025 was a difficult year for its rental portfolio, with early strength in rents fading later in the year, while San Francisco and New York remained relative standouts and are expected to be firm contributors in 2026. The company now expects demand to stabilize and new supply pressures to ease in 2026, and is doubling down on selling lower-growth properties to fund share repurchases while keeping development highly selective to support operational...
